zh.lifeSummary: 當George Seton於1481年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓時，他的父親Sir George Seton32歲，母親Lady Margaret Campbell25歲。他於1507年1月25日與Lady Jane Janet Hepburn在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1513年登記服兵役。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年32歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾特藍特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Seton于1481年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓时，他的父亲Sir George Seton32岁，母亲Lady Margaret Campbell25岁。他于1507年1月25日与Lady Jane Janet Hepburn在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1513年登记服兵役。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年32岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾特藍特。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Seton was born in 1481, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir George Seton, was 32 and his mother, Lady Margaret Campbell, was 25. He married Lady Jane Janet Hepburn on 25 January 1507, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1513. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Seton est né en 1481, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir George Seton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Campbell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Janet Hepburn le 25 janvier 1507, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Seton 1481 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Seton 32 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Campbell 25. Er hat am 25. Januar 1507 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Lady Jane Janet Hepburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Seton è nato il nel 1481 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir George Seton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Campbell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane Janet Hepburn il 25 gennaio 1507, nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: George Setonが1481年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた時，父Sir George Setonは32歳，母Lady Margaret Campbellは25歳であった。1507年1月25日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンでLady Jane Janet Hepburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで32歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアトランエントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Seton(이)가 1481년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Seton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Campbell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1507년 1월 25일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 Lady Jane Janet Hepburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 트랜트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Seton nasceu em 1481, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir George Seton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Campbell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Janet Hepburn em 25 de janeiro de 1507, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Seton родился в 1481 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir George Seton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Campbell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Janet Hepburn 25 января 1507 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности транент, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

sm.from 1508 to 1513: mai le 1508 e o'o I le 1513

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Seton nació en 1481, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir George Seton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Campbell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Jane Janet Hepburn el 25 de enero de 1507, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Tranent, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
